author: Viggo Meesters
description: Open .csv and .tsv files as a read-only table with search, source view, and parse warnings. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Viggo Meesters
manifest.description: Open .csv and .tsv files as a read-only table with search, source view, and parse warnings.
manifest.name: CSV TSV Viewer

name: CSV TSV Viewer

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description:
Initial public release.

Features:
- Open .csv and .tsv files in a read-only table view.
- Source view with line numbers.
- Search/filter across visible rows.
- Comma/semicolon detection for CSV and tab delimiter for TSV.
- Parse warnings and 10,000-row render cap.

Release assets: main.js, manifest.json, styles.css.
